headline: NVR INC (NYSE:NVR) Passes the Caviar Cruise Quality Screen with Stellar Profitability and Health Metrics
summary: Quality investing strategy identifies NVR Inc. as a strong candidate with 115% ROIC, 92% cash conversion, and conservative debt, despite modest short-term growth.
